hero.title: Directive 8020
hero.description: Directive 8020 is a cinematic sci-fi survival horror adventure set aboard the Cassiopeia, where player choices, alien mimicry, co-op tension, and branching outcomes decide who survives.

gameFeature.title: Directive 8020 Gameplay
gameFeature.description: Survive the Cassiopeia, read the crew, evade a mimic organism, and make choices that reshape Directive 8020 outcomes.

directive8020ReleaseDate.title: Directive 8020 Release Date: May 12, 2026
directive8020ReleaseDate.intro: Directive 8020 launches on May 12, 2026 for PC via Steam, PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X|S. This section covers the launch date, platform status, release timing, and day-one setup players need before boarding the Cassiopeia.

cards.label: Release Date
cards.description: Directive 8020 is scheduled to launch worldwide on May 12, 2026.

cards.label: Launch Time
cards.description: Store listings show Directive 8020 unlocking at 14:00 UTC on launch day.

cards.label: Platforms
cards.value: PC Steam, PS5, Xbox Series X|S
cards.description: Directive 8020 launches on Steam for PC, PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X|S.

cards.label: Release Status
cards.description: Directive 8020 is available to pre-order or pre-purchase before launch.

cards.label: Game Type
cards.description: Directive 8020 blends story-driven horror, real-time alien danger, and branching choices.

cards.label: Story Setup
cards.description: Directive 8020 follows a deep-space mission where the crew faces a mimic organism.

notes: Directive 8020 is built around a new deep-space setting in The Dark Pictures Anthology.
Directive 8020 launch platforms focus on current-generation console and PC hardware.
Directive 8020 preorder pages highlight both standard purchase options and Digital Deluxe upgrade content.
Directive 8020 release planning should prioritize platform choice, co-op group size, and PC requirements.

directive8020SteamPreOrder.title: Directive 8020 Steam Pre-Order, Price, and Store Options
directive8020SteamPreOrder.intro: Directive 8020 is available to pre-purchase on Steam, with console pre-orders live on PlayStation Store and Xbox Store. Compare price, edition status, platform features, and preorder bonuses before choosing where to play.

stores.detail: Best fit for PC players who want Steam achievements, Steam Cloud, controller support, and Remote Play features.
Best fit for console players who want PS5 features, local play, and DualSense support.
Best fit for Xbox players who want local co-op, cloud saves, 4K Ultra HD support, and achievements.

directive8020SystemRequirements.title: Directive 8020 System Requirements for PC
directive8020SystemRequirements.intro: Directive 8020 requires a 64-bit Windows 10 or Windows 11 PC, 16 GB RAM, and a modern DirectX-capable GPU. Use this table to compare the minimum and recommended PC setup before pre-purchasing on Steam.

requirements.note: Directive 8020 requires a 64-bit processor and operating system.
Directive 8020 recommended play favors a newer mid-range CPU class.
Directive 8020 lists 16 GB RAM for both minimum and recommended setups.

requirements.minimum: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2060 / AMD Radeon RX 5700
requirements.recommended: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3070 Ti / AMD Radeon RX 6800
requirements.note: Directive 8020 PC planning should check GPU class first, then CPU and storage.
Directive 8020 benefits from SSD storage for smoother loading.

summary: Directive 8020 minimum PC planning starts around RTX 2060 or Radeon RX 5700 class graphics.
Directive 8020 recommended PC planning moves toward RTX 3070 Ti or Radeon RX 6800 class graphics.
Directive 8020 storage planning should keep at least 40 GB free before installation.

directive8020Gameplay.title: Directive 8020 Gameplay: Choices, Alien Threats, and Survival Horror
directive8020Gameplay.intro: Directive 8020 keeps the cinematic choice-driven DNA of The Dark Pictures Anthology while adding stronger real-time survival pressure. Players must survive alien threats, make deadly decisions, and manage trust inside the Cassiopeia crew.

features.title: Directive 8020 Story-Driven Survival
features.description: Directive 8020 combines interactive movie pacing with survival-focused decision making in a deep-space horror setting.

features.title: Directive 8020 Real-Time Danger
features.description: Directive 8020 adds direct pressure through dark corridors, stealth moments, quick reactions, and improvised survival choices.

features.title: Directive 8020 Trust No One
features.description: Directive 8020 turns crew suspicion into a gameplay problem because the organism can imitate its prey.

features.title: Directive 8020 Consequence Routes
features.description: Directive 8020 choices affect relationships, routes, character survival, and the outcome of critical scenes.

features.title: Directive 8020 Turning Points
features.description: Directive 8020 lets players revisit key decisions through a story tree built for alternate paths and character saves.

features.title: Directive 8020 Movie Night
features.description: Directive 8020 supports solo play and up to five-player couch co-op for groups sharing the horror story.

survivalNotes: Directive 8020 rewards careful reading of crew behavior because the mimic threat changes how trust works.
Directive 8020 survival depends on stealth, timing, and quick reactions as much as dialogue choices.
Directive 8020 replay value comes from branching routes, Turning Points, and alternate character outcomes.

directive8020Story.title: Directive 8020 Story
directive8020Story.intro: Directive 8020 follows the Cassiopeia mission as humanity searches for a new future on Tau Ceti f. The story mixes Earth-scale stakes with shipboard paranoia, alien mimicry, and crew decisions that shape who makes it home.

chapters.label: Premise
chapters.name: Directive 8020 Earth Crisis
chapters.description: Directive 8020 begins with humanity looking beyond Earth for survival, sending the Cassiopeia toward Tau Ceti f.

chapters.label: Location
chapters.name: Directive 8020 Cassiopeia
chapters.description: Directive 8020 places the crew inside a stranded vessel where every corridor can hide danger.

chapters.label: Destination
chapters.name: Directive 8020 Tau Ceti f
chapters.description: Directive 8020 frames Tau Ceti f as a possible future for humanity and the center of the mission.

chapters.label: Threat
chapters.name: Directive 8020 Mimic Organism
chapters.description: Directive 8020 turns imitation into horror by making the crew question who is still human.

directive8020Trailer.title: Directive 8020 Trailer
directive8020Trailer.intro: Directive 8020 trailers focus on the Cassiopeia, Lashana Lynch as Young, alien mimic tension, the May 12, 2026 launch date, and the survival horror systems driving the next Dark Pictures story.

videos.title: Directive 8020 Official 60 Second Trailer
videos.description: Directive 8020 explains its release date, platform plan, preorder details, story setup, and survival focus in a fast overview.

videos.title: Directive 8020 Announce Trailer
videos.description: Directive 8020 introduces the Cassiopeia mission, the deep-space horror tone, and the alien threat.

videos.title: Directive 8020 Story Trailer
videos.description: Directive 8020 story footage highlights crew tension, Young, Tau Ceti f, and the consequences of trust.

videos.title: Directive 8020 Co-Op Trailer
videos.description: Directive 8020 multiplayer footage focuses on local Movie Night play and shared decision pressure.

directive8020Characters.title: Directive 8020 Characters
directive8020Characters.intro: Directive 8020 characters center on the Cassiopeia crew, including Young, their mission roles, and the relationships tested by a mimic organism that can turn trust into danger.

crew.name: Directive 8020 Brianna Young
crew.description: Directive 8020 features Young as a central crew member, portrayed by Lashana Lynch, with leadership and survival pressure at the heart of the story.

crew.name: Directive 8020 Cassiopeia Crew
crew.description: Directive 8020 follows a spacefaring crew forced to make fast decisions as the ship and mission break down.

crew.name: Directive 8020 Compromised Crew
crew.description: Directive 8020 builds character tension around the possibility that someone trusted has been replaced.

crew.name: Directive 8020 Player-Controlled Survivors
crew.description: Directive 8020 character survival changes through choices, relationships, timing, and Turning Points.

crew.name: Directive 8020 Command Figures
crew.description: Directive 8020 uses mission hierarchy to create conflict when survival choices and orders collide.

crew.name: Directive 8020 Unknown Threat
crew.description: Directive 8020 treats the organism as both a monster and a character pressure point inside the crew.

directive8020CoOpMultiplayer.title: Directive 8020 Co-Op Multiplayer
directive8020CoOpMultiplayer.intro: Directive 8020 supports single-player and Movie Night couch co-op for up to five local players. Online multiplayer is planned as a free post-launch update, giving groups more ways to share the Cassiopeia story.

steps.title: Directive 8020 Single-Player
steps.description: Directive 8020 can be played solo, with one player making story, exploration, and survival choices.

steps.title: Directive 8020 Movie Night
steps.description: Directive 8020 Movie Night lets 2-5 local players pass control between characters and share major decisions.

steps.title: Directive 8020 Local Co-Op Setup
steps.description: Directive 8020 couch co-op works best when each player owns a crew member and tracks their choices.

steps.title: Directive 8020 Online Multiplayer
steps.description: Directive 8020 online multiplayer is planned for a free update after launch.

directive8020TurningPoints.title: Directive 8020 Turning Points
directive8020TurningPoints.intro: Directive 8020 Turning Points gives players a story tree for revisiting major decisions, exploring hidden paths, changing character outcomes, and replaying decisive moments without restarting the full journey.

steps.title: Directive 8020 Story Tree
steps.description: Directive 8020 maps major choice nodes so players can understand how routes branch.

steps.title: Directive 8020 Rewind Choices
steps.description: Directive 8020 lets players return to pivotal scenes and try a different decision.

steps.title: Directive 8020 Hidden Paths
steps.description: Directive 8020 Turning Points encourages replaying scenes to uncover routes that were missed before.

steps.title: Directive 8020 Character Saves
steps.description: Directive 8020 uses Turning Points to help players pursue alternate survival outcomes.

directive8020Platforms.title: Directive 8020 Platforms
directive8020Platforms.intro: Directive 8020 launches on PC via Steam, PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X|S. This section keeps the platform picture clear for players choosing between PC, PlayStation, and Xbox.

platforms.name: Directive 8020 PC Steam
platforms.description: Directive 8020 on Steam supports PC preorder, Steam features, controller support, achievements, and cloud saves.

platforms.name: Directive 8020 PlayStation 5
platforms.description: Directive 8020 on PS5 focuses on current-generation console play, local co-op, and DualSense support.

platforms.name: Directive 8020 Xbox Series X|S
platforms.description: Directive 8020 on Xbox Series X|S supports current-generation Xbox play, achievements, and local co-op.

directive8020DigitalDeluxeEdition.title: Directive 8020 Digital Deluxe Edition
directive8020DigitalDeluxeEdition.intro: Directive 8020 Digital Deluxe Edition content expands the launch package with cosmetics, collectibles, music, art, and visual extras. Preorder listings highlight the Digital Deluxe Edition Upgrade as a key bonus.

items.title: Directive 8020 Outfit Pack
items.description: Extra Directive 8020 crew cosmetics for players who want alternate looks.

items.title: Directive 8020 Dark Pictures Collectables
items.description: Additional Directive 8020 anthology collectable content tied to the wider series.

items.title: Directive 8020 Cinematic Filter Pack
items.description: Directive 8020 visual filters for players who want a different cinematic presentation.

items.title: Directive 8020 Digital Soundtrack
items.description: Directive 8020 music content for players who want the score outside the game.

items.title: Directive 8020 Digital Artbook
items.description: Directive 8020 concept and visual material for players interested in the game's production design.

items.title: Directive 8020 Preorder Bonus
items.description: Directive 8020 preorder pages highlight the upgrade as a launch-period incentive.

directive8020BeginnerGuide.title: Directive 8020 Beginner Guide
directive8020BeginnerGuide.intro: Directive 8020 rewards players who pay attention to crew behavior, route consequences, exploration cues, and co-op communication. These beginner questions focus on the first playthrough mindset.

faqs.question: What should Directive 8020 beginners focus on first?
faqs.answer: Directive 8020 beginners should focus on listening carefully, checking the environment, protecting key crew members, and treating trust as a gameplay resource.

faqs.question: How should Directive 8020 players handle choices?
faqs.answer: Directive 8020 choices should be made with relationships, survival pressure, and mimic suspicion in mind, because major decisions can change future scenes.

faqs.question: What matters in Directive 8020 co-op?
faqs.answer: Directive 8020 co-op works best when each player tracks their character, shares observations, and agrees how much risk the group will take.

faqs.question: How does Directive 8020 replay value work?
faqs.answer: Directive 8020 replay value comes from Turning Points, alternate choices, hidden paths, and different character survival outcomes.

directive8020ChoicesConsequences.title: Directive 8020 Choices and Consequences
directive8020ChoicesConsequences.intro: Directive 8020 choices can alter trust, relationships, scene routes, and survival outcomes. This section frames the story decisions players should watch closely during the Cassiopeia mission.

faqs.question: Do Directive 8020 choices affect character survival?
faqs.answer: Yes. Directive 8020 is built around branching decisions where timing, trust, and player responses can change who survives.

faqs.question: Why does trust matter in Directive 8020?
faqs.answer: Directive 8020 uses a mimic organism to make trust dangerous, so the crew's relationships and suspicious behavior matter during major decisions.

faqs.question: Can Directive 8020 choices be revisited?
faqs.answer: Directive 8020 Turning Points gives players a way to return to key decisions and explore alternate branches.

faqs.question: What makes Directive 8020 endings different?
faqs.answer: Directive 8020 endings are shaped by route decisions, character survival, relationship outcomes, and how players handle alien threat moments.

directive8020DarkPicturesConnection.title: Directive 8020 The Dark Pictures Connection
directive8020DarkPicturesConnection.intro: Directive 8020 is the next cinematic horror entry in The Dark Pictures Anthology from Supermassive Games. It carries forward choice-driven storytelling while moving the series into deep-space sci-fi survival horror.

items.name: Directive 8020 Anthology Entry
items.description: Directive 8020 belongs to The Dark Pictures Anthology and extends the series into a new sci-fi chapter.

items.name: Directive 8020 Supermassive Style
items.description: Directive 8020 continues Supermassive Games' focus on interactive horror, cinematic scenes, and player-driven outcomes.

items.name: Directive 8020 Until Dawn Lineage
items.description: Directive 8020 appeals to players who enjoy character survival, group tension, and dramatic choices.

items.name: Directive 8020 Sci-Fi Shift
items.description: Directive 8020 changes the anthology texture by moving from earthly horror into a stranded deep-space mission.

directive8020AgeRating.title: Directive 8020 Age Rating
directive8020AgeRating.intro: Directive 8020 is positioned as mature cinematic survival horror with violence, blood, strong language, and tense alien threat scenes. Rating details help players and families understand the content profile before launch.

ratings.title: Directive 8020 ESRB M
ratings.description: Directive 8020 carries a mature content profile built around horror violence, blood, strong language, and intense scenes.

ratings.title: Directive 8020 PEGI 18
ratings.description: Directive 8020 European rating context aligns with adult horror themes, violence, and fear-driven storytelling.

ratings.title: Directive 8020 Horror Descriptors
ratings.description: Directive 8020 includes deep-space body horror, creature threat, crew tension, and cinematic danger.

ratings.title: Directive 8020 Audience
ratings.description: Directive 8020 is designed for players comfortable with mature survival horror, stressful choices, and intense scenes.

faq.title: Directive 8020
faq.subtitle: Common Directive 8020 questions about release date, platforms, preorder, co-op, story, and gameplay.

questions.question: When is the Directive 8020 release date?
questions.answer: Directive 8020 launches on May 12, 2026 for PC via Steam, PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X|S.

questions.question: What platforms is Directive 8020 on?
questions.answer: Directive 8020 is confirmed for PC Steam, PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X|S.

questions.question: How much does Directive 8020 cost on Steam?
questions.answer: Directive 8020 is listed at $49.99 on Steam for pre-purchase.

questions.question: Does Directive 8020 have co-op?
questions.answer: Directive 8020 supports single-player and up to five-player local Movie Night co-op, with online multiplayer planned as a free post-launch update.

questions.question: What is Directive 8020 about?
questions.answer: Directive 8020 follows the Cassiopeia mission to Tau Ceti f, where the crew faces a mimic organism and choices that decide who survives.

questions.question: What are Directive 8020 Turning Points?
questions.answer: Directive 8020 Turning Points are a story tree system that lets players revisit major decisions, explore alternate branches, and change outcomes.
